scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm -w @music-share/api run dev" "npm -w @music-share/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w @music-share/api run build && npm -w @music-share/web run build
scripts.lint: npm -w @music-share/api run lint && npm -w @music-share/web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @music-share/api run typecheck && npm -w @music-share/web run typecheck
scripts.test: npm -w @music-share/api run test && npm -w @music-share/web run test
